hero.description: Web applications, AI-powered tools, and automation systems built with modern technologies.

about.p1: Computer Engineer graduated from ESI-SBA with a specialization in Information Systems and Web. Passionate about creating innovative user experiences and solving complex problems.
about.p2: My experience spans from immersive frontend development to building robust backend APIs, with particular expertise in AI integration and process automation.
about.p3: Creating great web experiences through clean code, thoughtful design, and user-centric development is at the heart of everything I do.

items.description: Analysis of information systems and business processes. Identification of automation and digitalization opportunities for workflows in an industrial environment.
Development of complete Full Stack solutions. Specialization in React, Next.js, Django with AI integration and process automation.

items.title: NeuroVIA - Medical AI Platform
items.description: Full stack platform for early detection of Alzheimer and Parkinson diseases using AI. Features interactive dashboards, secure patient management, secure file uploads, and subscription system.

items.title: Daresni - E-learning Platform
items.description: Online learning platform for teachers and students with real-time interaction. Microservices architecture with payment module and independent services.

items.title: Student Valley - Project Management
items.description: Academic project management system for startups and patents with real-time tracking and multi-platform support.
